Don’t know how great this is, it’s 4 AM and I’m planning to pull an all nighter

Mina fluff bot so cool. Still can’t believe my most popular bot is a Mina bot about the U.A traitor. I got that idea off C.AI cause people would milk that scenario so hard. Like seriously, I’ve seen a dude make a traitor bot for every notable character + all the girls + some of the teachers, and then continued to make reverse traitor bots where the character was the traitor. Shit was crazy. I’m yapping now

Just found out from making this that saying C.AI au

Gonna work on requests then make some bleach bots. I’m like 25 episodes in, give me some ideas please.
